hero.subtitle: FEATURES
hero.title: 40+ modules designed for service companies
hero.body: Everything you need to run operations, manage people, handle finances, and grow your business — in one connected platform.

sections.subtitle: Core Operations
sections.title: The daily engine of your business
sections.body: Schedule tasks, track time, manage quality, and keep your entire operation visible in real time. Your employees check in via their phones, and you see it all on the dashboard — who's where, what's done, what's pending.
sections.screenshot: Screenshot: Calendar week view with tasks + employee assignments
sections.screenshotAlt: Alt: Task detail showing check-in time, photos, checklist

sections.subtitle: Client Management
sections.title: Every client, every location, every detail
sections.body: Manage client information, addresses, contact persons, and location-specific guides that tell your team exactly how to service each site. Clients get their own portal to see upcoming tasks, invoices, photos, and floor plans.
sections.screenshot: Screenshot: Client detail page with location guide sections
sections.screenshotAlt: Alt: Client portal view (what your clients see)

sections.subtitle: Employee Management
sections.title: From hiring to daily performance
sections.body: Employees get their own portal with tasks, schedules, salary slips, and holiday requests. Managers track performance through an improvement system with tests, scoring, and incident tracking. The org diagram shows your entire structure at a glance.
sections.screenshot: Screenshot: Employee dashboard (mobile view) with tasks
sections.screenshotAlt: Alt: Holiday calendar or improvement/test system

sections.subtitle: Financial Suite
sections.title: Complete accounting built for Danish companies
sections.body: Full double-entry accounting with Danish chart of accounts, automated invoicing with e-Faktura support, bank reconciliation, BankConnect integration for direct bank payments, and VAT reporting ready for SKAT. Generate income statements and balance sheets with one click.
sections.screenshot: Screenshot: Billing overview with invoice list + e-Faktura badge
sections.screenshotAlt: Alt: Chart of accounts or bank reconciliation view

sections.subtitle: Payroll
sections.title: Danish payroll from hours to payslip
sections.body: Create payroll runs from tracked hours, calculate taxes and deductions, generate payslips, report to eIndkomst/SKAT, and export bank payment files — all without leaving the platform. Holiday pay and pension calculations follow Danish law automatically.
sections.screenshot: Screenshot: Payroll run with employee entries + eIndkomst export
sections.screenshotAlt: Alt: Salary overview or payslip preview

sections.subtitle: Inventory & Procurement
sections.title: Track every item, from warehouse to client site
sections.body: Manage inventory across multiple storage locations, create purchase orders to suppliers, track stock levels, and build loadout templates for what each team needs on the road. Employees report usage directly from the task view.
sections.screenshot: Screenshot: Inventory list with stock levels + storage locations
sections.screenshotAlt: Alt: Purchase order detail or loadout template

sections.subtitle: Sales & CRM
sections.title: From lead to signed contract
sections.body: Build professional offers with equipment lists, cleaning schemes, and auto-generated PDFs. Run email sequences to nurture leads with open/click tracking. Manage your inbox with full IMAP integration. Set up a pricing library with services, add-ons, and notice fees.
sections.screenshot: Screenshot: Offer detail with cleaning scheme + PDF preview
sections.screenshotAlt: Alt: Email sequence list or lead pipeline

sections.subtitle: Documents & Analytics
sections.title: Templates, signatures, and data-driven decisions
sections.body: Create document templates with placeholders that auto-fill from your data, send for e-signature, and generate client reports. Track task KPIs, employee performance, client profitability, and feedback analytics from a unified dashboard.
sections.screenshot: Screenshot: Task KPI dashboard or profitability analytics
sections.screenshotAlt: Alt: Document template builder or e-signature flow

admin.title: Platform Administration
admin.body: For platform operators: provision tenants, assign pricing plans, control module access per company, set resource quotas (users, storage, employees, clients), and manage subscription billing — all from a dedicated admin console.

cta.title: See it in action
cta.body: Book a 30-minute demo and we'll walk you through the modules that matter most to your business.

hero.subtitle: FUNKTIONER
hero.title: 40+ moduler designet til servicevirksomheder
hero.body: Alt hvad I behover for at drive drift, administrere medarbejdere, styre okonomi og vokse jeres forretning — i en sammenhaengende platform.

sections.subtitle: Kernedrift
sections.title: Den daglige motor i jeres forretning
sections.body: Planlaeg opgaver, registrer tid, styr kvalitet og hold hele driften synlig i realtid. Jeres medarbejdere tjekker ind via telefonen, og I ser det hele pa dashboardet — hvem der er hvor, hvad der er gjort, og hvad der mangler.
sections.screenshotAlt: Alt: Opgavedetalje med check-in-tid, fotos, tjekliste

sections.subtitle: Kundestyring
sections.title: Hver kunde, hver lokation, hver detalje
sections.body: Administrer kundeinformation, adresser, kontaktpersoner og lokationsspecifikke guides, der fortaeller jeres team praecis, hvordan hver lokation skal serviceres. Kunder far deres egen portal med kommende opgaver, fakturaer, fotos og plantegninger.

sections.subtitle: Medarbejderstyring
sections.title: Fra ansaettelse til daglig performance
sections.body: Medarbejderne far deres egen portal med opgaver, vagtplaner, lonsedler og ferieanmodninger. Ledere folger performance via et forbedringssystem med tests, scoring og haendelsesregistrering. Organisationsdiagrammet viser hele jeres struktur med et overblik.

sections.subtitle: Okonomisuite
sections.title: Komplet bogforing bygget til danske virksomheder
sections.body: Fuld dobbelt bogforing med dansk kontoplan, automatiseret fakturering med e-Faktura-understottelse, bankafstemning, BankConnect-integration til direkte bankbetalinger og momsindberetning klar til SKAT. Generer resultatopgorelse og balance med et klik.

sections.subtitle: Lon
sections.title: Dansk lon fra timer til lonseddel
sections.body: Opret lonkorsel fra registrerede timer, beregn skat og fradrag, generer lonsedler, indberetning til eIndkomst/SKAT og eksporter bankbetalingsfiler — alt uden at forlade platformen. Feriepenge og pensionsberegninger folger automatisk dansk lovgivning.

sections.subtitle: Lager & Indkob
sections.title: Spor hver vare, fra lager til kundelokation
sections.body: Administrer lagerbeholdning pa tvaers af flere lagerlokationer, opret indkobsordrer til leverandorer, folg lagerniveauer og byg pakkelister til hvad hvert team skal bruge pa ruten. Medarbejdere rapporterer forbrug direkte fra opgavevisningen.

sections.subtitle: Salg & CRM
sections.title: Fra lead til underskrevet kontrakt
sections.body: Byg professionelle tilbud med udstyrslister, rengoeringsskemaer og autogenererede PDF'er. Kor emailsekvenser til at pleje leads med abnings-/kliksporing. Administrer jeres indbakke med fuld IMAP-integration. Opret et prisbibliotek med ydelser, tilvalg og opsigelsesbetingelser.

sections.subtitle: Dokumenter & Analyser
sections.title: Skabeloner, signaturer og datadrevne beslutninger
sections.body: Opret dokumentskabeloner med pladsholdere, der automatisk udfyldes fra jeres data, send til e-signering og generer kunderapporter. Folg opgave-KPI'er, medarbejderperformance, kunderentabilitet og feedbackanalyser fra et samlet dashboard.

admin.title: Platformsadministration
admin.body: For platformsoperatorer: opret lejere, tildel prisplaner, styr moduladgang per virksomhed, saet ressourcekvoter (brugere, lager, medarbejdere, kunder) og administrer abonnementsfakturering — alt fra en dedikeret administrationskonsol.

cta.title: Se det i praksis
cta.body: Book en 30-minutters demo, sa viser vi jer de moduler, der betyder mest for jeres forretning.
